claim_bullets.bullet_text: Its basic form parallels the way linear data structures like lists are constructed: This helps make it understandable. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.116-116)
Its specialized cases of mapping and folding are especially useful and can be used to build other functions. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.116-116)
And finally, while folding is a special case of linear recursion, mapping is a special case of folding. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.116-116)

source_record_text: JavaScript Allongé explores fundamental and advanced JavaScript concepts, including logical operators, control flow mechanisms, and linear recursion.
